channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin Owner Claims Claude AI Cracked Lost Wallet Password, Netting $400K in BTC
item.description: A viral thread on X drew millions of views as a user claimed Claude AI helped recover a lost Bitcoin wallet.

item.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong gets behind CLARITY Act ahead of Thursday markup
item.description: Armstrong said the bill is "closer than ever" to advancing in the US Congress after months of negotiations between the crypto industry and banks.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to lead Federal Reserve
item.description: The US Senate voted largely along party lines to confirm Kevin Warsh to lead the Fed’s Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

item.title: Bitcoin Rally Cut Short as Profit-Taking Rises, US Demand Falls: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin's recent rally stalled at a critical level, putting the top crypto asset in a position that has previously led to major downturns.

item.title: Myriad Adopts Chainlink as Official Oracle Platform to Power New Crypto Prediction Markets
item.description: Chainlink Runtime Environment enables Myriad to deploy a new range of prediction markets with immediate settlement.

item.title: Whale shorts $70M in crypto and tech: Should Bitcoin traders worry?
item.description: Despite short-term bearish bets from a successful Hyperliquid whale, a growing US Fed balance sheet and rising inflation support Bitcoin in the long term.

item.title: Crypto-Friendly Kevin Warsh Confirmed as Fed Chair to Replace Jerome Powell
item.description: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve, was confirmed as its new chair Wednesday to replace Jerome Powell.

item.title: Senators File Clarity Act Amendments on DeFi, Trump Family, and Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee will vote tomorrow on the new additions to the crypto bill, before deciding whether to refer it to the Senate floor.

item.title: Polymarket's monthly volume declines for first time since August
item.description: Prediction markets trading volume had been tracking monthly gains as the sector gains popularity among short-term traders, but competition is also increasing.

item.title: Ethereum app builder Consensys has delayed its potential IPO until fall
item.description: The MetaMask wallet builder had reportedly engaged bankers from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs to lead the process.

item.title: Bitcoin traders expect ‘fast move’ to $90K following CLARITY Act vote
item.description: Bitcoin traders eye a possible move higher as short-term selling pressure fades and the CLARITY Act vote boosts crypto market focus.

item.title: Price predictions 5/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin’s pullback is expected to find support near $79,000, but every recovery attempt is likely to be sold into.

item.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
item.description: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.

item.title: US government asks for $1M forfeiture from ex-Celsius exec ahead of sentencing
item.description: Former Celsius chief revenue officer Roni Cohen-Pavon, scheduled to be sentenced on Thursday after a guilty plea, agreed to a judgment of $1 million that he obtained as a result of his crimes.

item.title: Bitcoin Firm Metaplanet Posts $725 Million Loss, Delays Preferred Share Offerings
item.description: Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich acknowledged that preferred shares unveiled in November have yet to be issued.

item.title: UK Treasury: Digital Assets Have Potential for 'Complete Transformation' of Markets
item.description: The Economic Secretary to the Treasury highlighted an upcoming consultation on payments encompassing digital assets and AI agents.

item.title: 'Lord of the Rings' Director Peter Jackson Says AI Is 'Just a Special Effect'
item.description: Peter Jackson says Hollywood’s fears around AI could hurt recognition for performance-capture acting, as debates about how the technology will reshape the movie industry grow.

item.title: How Figure is Democratizing Crypto-as-Collateral for Mainstream Users
item.description: As digital assets make inroads into the mainstream, crypto lender Figure is helping to turn them into viable collateral for credit.

item.title: Fidelity International launches Moody’s-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink
item.description: The Bermuda-based asset manager launched a tokenized liquidity fund using Chainlink and Sygnum infrastructure, with JPMorgan providing daily NAV data for pricing.

item.title: The Protocol: Solana’s ‘Alpenglow’ upgrade is live for testing
item.description: Also: LayerZero apology, Ronin layer-2 transition and ‘Clear Signing’

item.title: Tea Protocol announces June 4 mainnet launch and TGE on Aerodrome to secure open-source development in the AI era
item.description: This quarter, AI started writing its own exploits. Tea is shipping the trust layer underneath it. Code Is Abundant. Trust Is Not.

item.title: Metaplanet delays preferred share listing amid challenging Japanese market structure
item.description: CEO Simon Gerovich says regulatory and infrastructure challenges are slowing the launch of Metaplanet's perpetual preferred share.

item.title: UK parliament to probe Nigel Farage’s $6.8 million donation from crypto billionaire
item.description: If found guilty of violating the Parliamentary code of conduct, the Reform UK party leader could be suspended from the House of Commons.

item.title: Charles Schwab Begins Offering Bitcoin, Ethereum Trading to US Users
item.description: Charles Schwab started allowing select users to trade Bitcoin and Ethereum directly alongside their other investments.

item.title: Traders say Ethereum ready for a 'strong move' after ETH price taps $2.3K
item.description: Market analysts eye fresh Ethereum upside, fueled by JPMorgan and BlackRock tokenized fund moves plus looming CLARITY Act catalyst.

item.title: Bitcoin buyers with long-term 'conviction' surges 300% with most recent buyers sitting on profits
item.description: Bitcoin held by so-called conviction buyers has surged to nearly 4 million BTC, a roughly 300% increase since late 2025.

item.title: Bank of England Treating Stablecoins as 'New Form of Money', Says Exec
item.description: The U.K.’s central bank is “not picking winners” in the debate over tokenized deposits and stablecoins, Sasha Mills said Wednesday.

item.title: Bitcoin price targets $79K as US PPI inflation hits highest since 2022
item.description: Bitcoin slipped further below the $80,000 mark as US PPI data compounded the inflation problem from the US-Iran war and associated high oil prices.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Bitcoin vs. gold: 26% relative undervaluation
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Dovile Silenskyte provides an alternative to the “bitcoin as a risk asset” narrative. Then, Joshua de Vos shares insights and analysis on global exchanges.

item.title: Telecom giant KDDI to acquire 14.9% stake in Coincheck Group in $65 million deal
item.description: The companies signed a business alliance for revenue sharing, referral fees and customer referrals to expand crypto access in Japan.

item.title: Clarity Act amendments would remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future
item.description: The U.S. crypto market structure bill is being targeted with dozens of amendments aiming to change or add to the text as its Senate hearing approaches.

item.title: Animoca-backed NUVA connects Figure's $19 billion of tokenized assets to Ethereum
item.description: The protocol, led by veteran BNY executive Anthony Moro, aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets, starting with home equity lines of credit and Treasuries.

item.title: Brickken and Magma partner to deliver Net Asset Value (NAV) oracle for tokenized real estate
item.description: Built on Magma's Digital Twin Token (DTT) and Brickken's institutional tokenization infrastructure to close the data gap that has held tokenized real estate back.

item.title: Paybis secures MiCA, payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
item.description: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

item.title: Half of AI Health Advice Is Wrong—And Seems Just Right
item.description: A peer-reviewed audit in BMJ Open found that nearly 50% of health responses from five major AI chatbots were problematic, with fabricated sources and confident delivery.

item.title: Crypto wallet provider Ledger puts U.S. IPO plans on hold due to market conditions
item.description: The French crypto security firm, which is said to have explored a potential $4 billion U.S. listing, is reassessing its public market plans as volatile conditions weigh on investor appetite for crypto IPOs.

item.title: Quantum Computing Threat 'Mostly a Coordination Issue' for Bitcoin: Fireblocks CEO
item.description: Michael Shaulov argued that changing to a post-quantum cryptographic signature scheme is “not a technical challenge” for Bitcoin.

item.title: It’s time for clarity for America’s digital asset markets
item.description: Recent polls have shown that registered voters want America to set the rules for global finance, reinforcing why the Senate must act now, explains Smith.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says the Bitcoin and crypto market structure bill "is closer than ever." 👀 "The bill is strong. It will benefit the American people" 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9lbl9GeHUwM0dOaGNHVFV5enVMWk9WUTV3OVNRX3ExaXl2WUx3eDdRR2E1T2owM0I4M09qZmFtS09sZDBMZXVzblhzM3pNUWVrU1Y1RmlKWlRsaTB1ZlRWVlFPd3NKbGs?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase CEO Brian…

item.title: Farage faces UK standards probe over $7M gift from crypto billionaire
item.description: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.

item.title: Anthropic, OpenAI tokens plunge as AI firms say pre-IPO share transfers are invalid
item.description: Tokens on Solana that claim to track the private-market valuations of Anthropic and OpenAI dropped sharply this week after both AI companies warned that the structures used to back the tokens may be invalid.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 3.2% as index trades lower
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 2.7% from Tuesday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin dips below $80,000 as producer price inflation surges to 6%
item.description: U.S. PPI surged well above forecasts in April, reviving concerns that rising oil prices and Iran-related supply risks may feed another inflation wave.

item.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
item.description: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.

item.title: Bitcoin to $100K in Q2? Strategy’s STRC unlocks potential to buy 3K BTC in two days
item.description: Strategy’s potential 3,127 BTC buy this week, alongside falling stablecoin dominance, suggests more capital may enter the Bitcoin market.

item.title: The 2020 signal returns: Why the copper-to-gold breakout could point to bitcoin breakout
item.description: The ratio has climbed above its 200-day moving average for the first time meaningfully since September 2020, a move that has historically preceded major bitcoin rallies.

item.title: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement for AI agent payments
item.description: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement, letting AI agents authorize many small payments offchain before settling them later onchain.

item.title: Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as bitcoin stalls, Fed rate-rise concerns build
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 13, 2026

item.title: Arkham maps Iran central bank wallets after $344M USDT freeze
item.description: Arkham’s new map links OFAC‑sanctioned Tron wallets to Iran’s central bank, putting Tehran’s alleged onchain reserves and counterparties in full public view.

item.title: Morning Minute: CPI Comes In Hot; Stocks, Crypto Shrug
item.description: Hot CPI didn't stall markets for long, while the Clarity Act has already received 100 amendments ahead of tomorrow's markup.

item.title: Bitcoin holds below $81,000 with Trump-Xi talks on the horizon
item.description: Bitcoin held steady before President Donald Trump's with his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping.

item.title: The $82,000 battle: bitcoin tests key resistance zone to form next major breakout
item.description: BTC is fighting a technical battle as it trades just below two closely watched long-term trend indicators: the 200-day Simple Moving Average and the 200-day Exponential Moving Average.

item.title: Charles Schwab begins U.S. rollout of spot crypto trading for retail customers
item.description: An initial group of clients can now trade bitcoin and ether on the Schwab Crypto platform.

item.title: EToro reiterates commitment to crypto despite falling activity in Q1
item.description: CEO Yoni Assia says he’s bullish on crypto and expects to see it back to all-time highs this year even as crypto derivatives trading on eToro dropped.

item.title: ⚡️ LATEST: Jane Street reduced its Bitcoin ETF exposure in Q1 2026, with IBIT falling about 71% and FBTC about 60%, while also cutting its MSTR stake by roughly 78% quarter-over-quarter. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5jNUpiOE9jWkd3U3cyVm0ySjBfam5ndS1xUnM3RHpGaXlQVW1venU4TUNDZWhOa05QelN1LTVUUTRJWUFEc1BuVm5lYjBpUng3dHZ6N1ZEeDktOWxjS3pGY2NNTUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LATEST: Jane Street reduced …

item.title: 🚨 TOMORROW IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DAY FOR CRYPTO IN U.S. The U.S. Senate Banking Committee votes on the CLARITY Act tomorrow, May 14, the first comprehensive crypto regulation bill in U.S. history. It defines which crypto assets are regulated - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE84MS1ZQXk3MEpGQzg5dHotTTlMYmlwWkxCT2o3UDZ3MC00SS1ESUdjLUc4Z25rci01Z2VOOXJEaGljZDdmU19wck1tR0ZPQnNXNXAxei15bjVVaUc5ampLYkRqdw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 TOMORROW IS THE MOST IMPORTAN…

item.title: 🇯🇵 LATEST: Japan’s enterprise-focused blockchain Japan Open Chain to launch “EJPY,” a yen-pegged stablecoin for B2B settlements. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9Cb2ZvRFRXQlVsbVExUE1KUnllbTd1WmRwb1k2M3pjWHNVb0xSWUxxQ1JoaktjYi16dHd0aWxaWWJKb3hSczltaDF5bXlxckRBZDdVZnZ0Z05DYkM2R0ZPZy1ybXk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇯🇵 LATEST: Japan’s enterprise…

item.title: Wells Fargo Increases Ethereum ETF Holdings in Q1 2026 13F Filing A Q1 2026 13F filing submitted by Wells Fargo to the SEC shows that the bank significantly increased its holdings of Ethereum ETFs. Specifically, its position in iShares Ethereum Trust (ETH - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE0zWWlrTDJoWXFIUDdiVnE3NW91dGw4U0J5aTFsRUpFOTdxRXJ3MzBuSFFkd3E5MWUzVXkwNEFZTkt6cWx2NE9zU2sxRlVRN3c0dC1QVUlZWjBmeUpUZk9GQnAwQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Wells Fargo Increases Ethereum E…

item.title: Trailer for $POSITIONS, a new comedic thriller about modern crypto schemes. Now avaliable on VOD. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE01OFFBMzMwZTZCWHBfS2ZXVFVObjVzN1Fnd0QwWTVMN0lpZ1BuMThfWmVnSlI5UnFkZFN2TXFQekdpTFRxYlFTc3lCeW9BV2tRSXU4V1RBcVNWYVV1MUlIZlhCbjlBZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Trailer for $POSITIONS, a ne…
